creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wxs
Date: Sat Jul  6 19:59:15 2013
New Revision: 322411
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322411

Log:
  Mark IGNORE after www/MT update.
  
  PR:		ports/180252
  Submitted by:	Takefu <takefu@airport.fm>

Modified:
  head/russian/MT/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/russian/MT/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/russian/MT/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 19:58:51 2013	(r322410)
+++ head/russian/MT/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 19:59:15 2013	(r322411)
@@ -7,6 +7,8 @@ DISTNAME=	MTOS-${PORTVERSION}-${PKGNAMEP
 
 COMMENT=	Russian localization of the MovableType publishing system
 
+IGNORE=		source file not found
+
 MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../www/MT
 MT_LANG=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX:S,-,,U}
 CONFLICTS=	MT-[2-5].* de-MT-[2-5].* fr-MT-[2-5].* ja-MT-[2-5].*
